title: Integrate a feature behind Laravel/Symfony seams
description: Add a feature using container bindings, migrations, and events so it stays testable and framework-idiomatic.
body: Steps: 1. Model the data with a migration and (Eloquent/Doctrine) entity, keeping schema changes versioned. 2. Put business logic in a service class bound in the container (a service provider in Laravel, services.yaml in Symfony). 3. Wire HTTP through a thin controller that resolves the service via injection. 4. Emit domain events for cross-cutting effects rather than inlining them. 5. Add feature and unit tests using the framework test case. Rollback point: the migration's down() and the unbound service, before exposing the route. Validation: a feature test drives the route end to end and a unit test swaps the bound service via the container.
